star_1.text: Although I admit I have spend a lot of time playing this game, I can't recommend it. It is super repetitive, very unfair, and requires you to be playing constantly to progress. And even then, unlocking new things is somewhat useless because you just reset at a certain point. The gameplay itself is just watching your robot fight for you. Lastly, it is filled with advertisements. I am not hard to please when it comes to mobile games, but this is just straight up bad.

game could be fun, but what's with all the very intrusive ads? an ad after literally every game is uncalled for. reading the reviews, the devs claim they don't want the ads to be intrusive but, they clearly do, and no i am not paying you to turn off ads, I shouldn't have too. don't give me that "we make money", but, yet you have an offer wall, with no offers. I can't rate higher because of that ads, I spend more time closing the game than actually playing it.

Game was only OK when it came out years ago, it has since been bought out by some other company. Now it is nothing but ads and microtransaction trash with some flashes and explosions to make it feel like an actual game, but it's not. It is a clever way to trick you into spending money to "progress" further. EXTREMELY pay to win. And the prices are insane. Anyone who pays this company money deserves to lose it all.

I have been playing this game for three years and it has remained my favorite. The developers are always on top of bug fixes and constantly improving gameplay. This is one of the only games that I have found in which you don't have to pay to play yet you can still keep up with players who do. Edit* Since adding a bunch of new weapons and things, the balance that this game used to have is gone. No longer is this a fair, fun game. Sadly after more than 3 years playing, I am unistalling.

This game is fantastic, and one of my favorites! However, the amount of ads forced on the player is absolutely ridiculous. I understand the devs need some type of money since this is a free game, but at this point, its greed. Cant even play for 5 minutes without getting 2-3 ads. You can only play one or two matches before getting bombarded with unskippable ads. Unistalled becuase of this; its insane.

// Review from years many years ago: Great graphics, engaging game play. Easy to learn. Great for both casual and serious players. PvP in a whole new way. // Update: I came back after a year off and found all the worst mobile game elements added in my absence. Card collecting, upgrade trees, and so many pop-ups for buying or spending multiple types of premium currency that I lost count. Sorry Zepto, you took a good title and turned it into an (even more so) obvious pay to win cash grab.

DO NOT WASTE YOUR TIME OR MONEY. It's kinda fun for about 2 hours, then it becomes a pay-to-win/pay-to-advance game, which i truly despise. I even gave the greedy dev's $3 to avoid ads, but once you get just a little bit into the game (metal parts) you can no longer enjoy the game without frequent gem or box purchases. Unless you pay money often, you will be waiting about a full day to get one more little thing you can do or unlock, and it usually won't even be enough to advance in the game.

UPDATE: DELETED GAME After my intial review below, I played the game a while longer without spending any more money. I pretty much stopped progressing completely. Boxes opened have worse equipment than what I currently have, and the hulls I get have so little power that they are basically useless. Im constantly trying to revamp my build to see if its even possible to win without money, but so far I have had no luck. As for the League, I have not advanced a single position as the limited parts you get for free are less than half as good as the pay to play parts. I am done with this waste of time they call a game. With the amount of ads you need to watch just to open a box of garbage, I have better things to do. Original review: Quickly... very quicly, becomes pay to win. You unlock boxes watching ads, but always seem to have sub-par equipment until you buy something which then rips opponents apart. Within the league you cannot do much without buying jewels to skip hard opponents and will just stay at the bottom with absolutely no way to advance.

starting to get greedy and using some questionable tactics in game to encourage spending. equally accessible, but there is a distinct canyon between free players and pay to play levels of progression. I've put a bit of money into the game and when I try to play without paying all progress is extremely difficult, especially when it comes to gang fights. the amount of times you have to use 10 gems for a fight you "might" have a chance to win is ridiculous. to finish all 10 fights requires money

The game is pretty fun but I wanted yo start over and cleared data and I lost all my ads free purchase even though it is connected to the same account. Don't be cheap, don't make people have to pay again for wanting to start over. Also, allow more fast forwards. We watch ads to fast forward so why would you limit this? You should want people playing as much as possible, there are long gaps of time where I am not playing because there is nothing to do unless I buy gems. Most won't buy gems.

loved the game perfect, but they ruined it with adds, 30 second adds no matter what you do, win, lose, doesn't matter. you can literally leave the game and re open it before the add will normally get done, nearly half my time playing the game is just watching an add. quit being greedy owners, just make it fun. other than the adds the game is 5 stars and I swear to that.

This game is nothing like it used to be. It used to be playable with very few ads, now however everything you do requires you to watch an ad. It is really a shame how a perfectly good game can be ruined by so many ads. Now watch the developer comment the same old stuff about "ads keep the game free" like they all do. update 4 years later: more ads than ever before.

2019: One Star - Unfortunately this game is quickly turning into a "pay to win" game. It's a shame really, was a great game. Now it's constant "buy this, buy that" upgrades and new weapons at $20 each that are otherwise unobtainable. Some players are impossibly powerful because they buy a ton of upgrades 2017: Five Stars - This is one of the best, most thought out and well designed games I've ever played for mobile devices. And it doesn't have super annoying ads or "buy me, buy me" pressure

Coming back to the game after a very long time and the first thing it does is force me to go into a battle without anything on my vehicle. I know how to play the game and it forces me to watch myself get destroyed for no reason, with no way to edit until after I'm forced to lose. Don't force people to try a co-pilot system that stops them from being allowed to edit their vehicle. WHAT CAN THE COPILOT DO FOR ME? You made me play vegetable simulator for no reason.

Played this game on my sons amazon tablet and we had a ton of fun. Downloaded the current full version and it's just bloated with ads and microtransactions. Not enjoyable at all and not even possible to play without buying your way up. Ridiculous that you can get to higher level battles but you don't get higher level parts when you win. Sad to see how they twisted this into something so terrible.

This game is fun, but utterly broken! I spent more than a few time watching videos for free items all for nothing. Then today, I purchased a package for 90% off of the value and the game didn't even give me what I bought. this game is frustrating and broken. if you're going to sell a product, make sure it works. Also, the game crashes all the time.

It's a good game and I would rate it higher if I wasn't banned without explanation. For no reason, the game decided to ban my account just after a battle. No explanation was given. When I pressed the "contact support" button, it wouldn't bring me to support. It would just display the same pop-up message "contact support." I liked the game and I would rate the game with more stars, but since this problem occurred, I'm giving the game a 1 star.

I dealt with the non stop ads. I dealt with the constant changes, and constant "rebalancing", I dealt with the glitchy combat, I dealt with the pay-to-play nature of it. But half the game is incomplete. You earn points for each round that you cant spend because they havent developed that portion at all (theres not even a name for it, it's just paw print trophies). They completely f*ed this game. it used to be good, I used to be a daily player. now? wont even touch the app, it's that frustrating.

I've decided to come back to this game to give it another try. I've edited some of my rating and alsi added new detail I think could be the deciding factor in anyone reserching before they download. After playing this game for a year its been fun. The only issue is I have been noticing a trend with the gang fights. They seem to be set up to make you pay to actually get 100. I'd like to call this anger purchasing. Just seems like that's the way they want to earn money. Also, you do not get gems like you used to. Shows that they care more about the money more than the fun. I know it's expected but I do not see a need to continue this game. Thanks for the fun while it lasted.

Is this even a game? Seemed like all I was doing was playing through a forced tutorial. I had to click and do exactly what it told me to, with no option to skip. Eventually I got to some tournament part where it appeared to just be an endless loop of fights, of the 11 I had the patience to sit through, I only won once. Of course there was no menu, exit, surrender, or any button of the like to leave said tournament, so I just decided to uninstall since I was not having fun.

star_2.text: This game had potential but they're looking for whales. I paid to remove ads but I'm not spending $5-$20 a time on micro transactions for my machine. It's a cash grab. After about an hour of play on the beginner levels the difficulty scales astronomically. Enemies have 4 to 5 times your health and once your vehicle is flipped there's no way to right itself so just go ahead and back out of the fight. If you're not spending big $$$ don't bother. Uninstalled.

Calling this 'P2W' is the understatement of a century, You can buy ANYTHING in this game and utterly demolish other players with items they cannot obtain EVER for free, and is 5 Tiers ahead. The only parts of this saving it from a 1 Star from me is the graphics, part strategies, and the handful of times a player can unlock freemium items with skill or luck. Dev just hit me with "Valuing skill and creativity" You can buy a car with 4 weapon slots, 3 tires, with a 250% Bonus for just $5 😬😬😬

I was excited to try this game again after years. but the excessive ads make it impossible to enjoy. also, it seems you get more ads if you lose? which feels punishing. if you try to exit out of an ad, it'll say, "Are you sure? you won't get the reward if you skip. " What reward? this was a forced ad. wouldn't waste your time if you don't like ads every 15-20 seconds

Used to play in 2021-2022. It's for the most part great, good mechanics, great graphics, and design, but the frequency of ads is insane. I can't even do 2 quick fights without getting an ad. It's so incredibly frustrating. You have to do a lot of quick fights just to get enough parts to fuse just to barely progress because the players in the championship have overpowered weapons and progression is impossible without otherwise paying.

This game is a waiting game. Wait 2 hours for some barely better parts. They match you up with even harder enemies that you can't beat so you'll have to wait for even "better" parts. It's not much of a strategy game when you're matched up with random people with random machines knowing nothing prior except their parts are probably substantially better or substantially worse than yours. You have to wait 2 days to get a ticket to play a better mode with a max limit of tickets being 5. Why a max limit? So you'll wait more and play more. This game seems more of a gimmick than a game.

The base of the game is fun. Build a car and let it fight. But, the ads are extremely annoying. This is the only game out of all the games on my phone that annoys me with the ads. There is no easy way to report problems with the game, which makes me think the devs don't care. Server errors have made me lose in game points. With that kind of error, I refuse to ever give this game actual money, but I have already watched enough ads to make them rich (yes, there are that many ads).

I am stubbed by the fact that this really could have been a game for me yet lacked its potential when it comes to the competitive side of thing... You see with this game you get just far enough where you literally can't go anywhere until you get that one part you need.... Basically what I'm saying is that if you want to win on a competitive level then you're going to have to pay or else you'll be stuck in the middle of the game not wanting to let it go with you watching ads whenever you can just to get the parts you need. Inevitably you are giving them money either way. It's not fair how apps like these can take so much advantage of players. What happened to games caring about their consumer. Games are trash nowadays and so is this game even if it's fun for a short time and looks great and is a great idea. Once you put money as a way to win by the consumer, it turns to greed and power hungry people on both sides of the spectrum both for power but one with real tangible power and that's the business with all the money you spend on useless things yet they get actual money to spend more on you to spend more on them.

I've read some of the reviews, I'm not sure wut they mean regarding ads. Speed up opening a watch an ad, also daily bonus, pick 1 of 3 items and the first 4x you watch an ad, the 5 time it's free. There are no forced ads. That being said, there are way 2 many p2w/p2p players on here for a f2p player to hv a chance. Basically, it's a whole lot of effort for very little reward. Also theres 2 different items that can stun u 4 ~5secs while opponent gets 2 atk. No longer enjoyable! UNINSTALLED!!!

I loved this game. This was one of my favorite mobile games out there, and honestly I put a ton of time and even money into it. While there were always the occasional pop-ups to advertise discounted products and such, it was never too intrusive. However, when I re-downloaded the game I was simply bombarded with literal dozens of pop-ups within seconds, continuing throughout every menu. This in addition to the overcomplicated additions has quite honestly ruined this game.

The original game was great and definitely worth at least 4 stars. It was a lot of fun. However, recent updates have made the game significantly less enjoyable. Part drops are dramatically nerfed, and the matching system just seems broken. It all seems like a blatant cash grab to me, forcing people to spend gems, which is really sad because it really is a cute game with lots of potential. But it has become so frustrating that I barely spend time playing anymore because it is no longer fun.

Needs several (minor) tweaks to be more user friendly and better navigation: Left side arrow on inventory screen (like the right side arrow). Better yet, ability to select the part type by selecting it's icon on a top row (super easy navigation to parts). More paw point abilities. Get rid of some of the carts and parts that NO ONE uses, both in regular and Ultimate (the "special" parts that cost 1000 Ultimate points to upgrade are ridiculous. Lower that nonsense.

Stopped playing bit heroes for this game. Enjoying every minute of it and can't wait to see what else is added in the future! Edit: The game has been turned into a grind fest and ads are constantly shoved down your throat. None of the purchases get rid of them either which is absolutely infuriating. Stopped playing completely after almost 2 years because of those reasons.

Its a good game for the most part. but the only issue i have is the account backup. i have played for a very long time, but my phone totally broke and had to be replaced.. once i tried to log on, it loaded an earlier game than my current save. i had just bought stuff on the game which i can no longer have access to cause it loads the wrong save. contacted support, all they had me do was clear cache then basically said oh well it was a personal problem. i asked for a refund and have been ignored.

Honestly the game was fun, for the first 2 weeks at least. After that the game slows down to the point where it became pay to win. You would be stuck on a stage for days (at times weeks) at a time until you either payed for the parts you needed or were there so long you manged to just barely get the last spot to progress forward. The Ads are the worst experience of them all. I've seldom seen a game that pushes Ads in your face as much as this one. You literally have to pay to get the Ads off.

This game use to be good, but the amount of ads shoved in your face after 2-3 rounds ruins the pace and make the whole game hard to enjoy. The mechanics and game play are great, but the ads just kills the whole mood and makes you frustrated to play. I am disappointed, to be honest, on how the game changed to be another ad cow to make money. This game was apart of my middleschool years. I hope the developers can see this and at least make the ads a little more spaced out like after every 10

Update: Too many ads Battle Bots done right! Remember that show where people build robots and fight them? This is that show in mobile form! A bit ad heavy until you pay as low as $2.00 to get a nice package. Easily one of the best mobile games out there! None of this 'waiting for energy' pay to play model, you can always fight or build, etc. The fun comes from testing out your builds and crushing your enemies. Oh, and DESIGN! The weapons get a different skin at higher levels! An absolute win!!!

This game has an awesome concept and a very appealing style. My only complaint would be that there is a 30 second, unskippable ad after every battle. And they want you to pay to remove said ads. I already watch the ads to reduce the time it takes to open a chess, so why should I have to watch more ads? I think that the developers are a bit greedy by adding so many ads into the game. I end up watching more ads than playing the actual game. Otherwise, a fun game. [2 stars now bc it's P2W]

Great concept enjoyed it greatly. It might just be me but I found mys3lf at a point where I couldn't progress further. The random fights got to difficult to win so the part supply fell. Item quality was bad but it made up for it with being able to use them to upgrade. It seems as though I hit a pay wall. I physically can't get any further unless I buy supply crates with real money, I don't enjoy the idea of pay to win games, the feel almost predatory, but that being said the mechanics are good.

This game is honesty great, I loved playing this game, probably one of the more fun games to play out there. But as of now it's just way to many ads it's actually just ridiculous. And more than that it's 100% pay to win. You can buy parts that have insane numbers and percentages. And something that bothers me is after my first prestige I ran into a bit of a problem with playing with prestige like 50's and having being destroyed by people who have stuff I can't even get yet. It's very unfair.

At first this was a great game and I did rate 5/5. This new update, however, has proven incredibly frustrating. Leveling up is near impossible now and its frustrating. Why "fix" (break) something that wasn't broken to begin with? I'm not going to pay money to upgrade each time, as I can tell that's what you're implying by including all those new paid boxes. Now I literally just get on to check if you changed it back.

star_3.text: The game is very nice and pretty simple. The inly reason this rate isn't a 5 star is because some of us users (including me) spent at least some kind of money for parts to advance quicker. now see, when you prestige, it states that you will lose all of your normal parts when you do so, making you lose said parts you paid for. The easiest way to fix this is simply by locking the item until you have reached a certain point, allowing for the user to return using their paid item.

The game is a lot more enjoyable and fun if you disable ads. Not only that, I really don't like how pay-to-win other players can get in the Championship. Sometimes, the only way to get a prestige without it taking 3-4 months--is to buy an offer. Please add a better balancing system in the Championship, like if you've not promoted for 2-3 days but still go online everyday, it'll change some, if not, all opponents to be bots, or players that are have builds that match your Damage, HP, etc. Thanks!

I still play this game, and while I don't plan to stop, I have to ask, what's the point of it? You can't possibly dream of becoming the best without spending tons of money to become the strongest. Also, one of my biggest complaints overall is when you reach prestige 1, you are matched with people of all prestige levels, giving them an advantage over you. They also introduced some wheel to the game, I spun it once, got nothing from it since the server had an error, and now it costs money.

While it is fun to play, the amount of ads is ridiculous. Want to not wait 4 hours for 6 peices of equipment that will almost always be at the bottom teir? Watch an ad. Want 1 piece of equipment that is up to your tier? Watch an ad. Hey, want free gems? Too bad, now you're stuck playing another game, because we said we'd give you gems if you did, and we're still making money off of you, despite not giving you anything. Other than that, it's ok.

Okay, I used to play this game alot when it first came out. But when I came back now, there's ad's and a unskipable tutorial, which isn't that bad, but I decided to pay them for no ad's and a little bonus of 1 legendary box and 100 gems. I got the 100 gems but I didn't get the box, I was fairly disappointed because the old cats never failed to give me my items. Now I'm not hating the game, I love how it's free. It's just that the old cats was way more improved, also I want my box pls, thank you.

This game is really fun; I LOVE the unique, strategic way of building your own vehicles to fight others. But there are WAY too many advertisements. Not only advertisements, but every time you open the app, you're bombarded with so many real cash purchases prompting you to buy them. You get about 5 purchase prompts IN A ROW. There's also no way to say, "Never ask again;" you can only press X to ignore until next time you open. Love the game itself, but needs WAY less ads and purchasing prompts.

I don't usually review games, but there are some shortcomings in this game that I believe stop it from being excellent. I really dislike the way that parts can only be attached at very specific locations on the car, as this takes away from the sandbox experience I was hoping for. Also I feel the ranking system could use some work, as it seems I'm basically grinding all the time just to get better parts ranks rather than actually being forced to be creative and make a vehicle design that can win.

The games great! I would give it an instant 5 stars if it wasn't for the excessive amount of hand holding. I get that tutorials are meant to teach you how to play the game, but dang you can cut it back a little. I get that you want to show me all the cool features about your game. But you really don't need to literally stop everything just to tell me about "the grand prix". There should really be an option to opt out of tutorials in the options menu and turn them on and off when you want

There's cats. You build tanks. They fight other cats. With tanks. The battles are automatic, which might be nice for some people. There's a surplus of ads and purchases are not permanent unlocks. Purchasing a weapon does not unlock it for future crates, so you'll need to keep buying them over and over to keep them up to par with your level. Upgrades to skills are also permanent, which is super lame if you change literally anything about your build, which (spoiler) you will.

The base game is fun. Build attack bots and see how they do. But it is highly pay to win + ads. Often the winner is the one who buys the best parts, strategy comes in a distant second. As a note to the devs. I like the physics engine, and would happily pay for an offline version that would let you freely build and test different parts, move mounting points, ect.

Fun game. Too many ads. Lots of pay to win. CATS let's you build all sorts of little machines to do "combat" against other machines. There are a bunch of mini games, and lots of combos to choose from. This game is online only, watch ads to win game. Not just quick ads, but ads where you to tap multiple things to proceed. I bought the add-on to remove ads, but there are still ads everywhere. When you start the game, sometimes you have to click through 3 "sales" to start playing.

More pay to win than before, used to be super fun but now it feels like they deliberately limit your ability to progress to force in-app purchases. This is extra shady when you realize that you can purchase items for relatively high prices that are not only rendered useless quickly, but outright lost with no return in value if you prestige (you have to do so in order to unlock everything). They should have made it so only ultimate parts were available for purchase.

Fun game, better if you pay the 3 bucks to end the intrusive ads. There is no "one-size-fits-all" build, you might win 9 fights easily and then find that one build that slaps you silly. The primary progress throttle is the loot boxes, 2 hours a pop from the get-go. Still, not bad for a freemium game. Edit: (- one star) a few days have passed. Now I have to reinstall the game every time I want to play.

Solid 3 stars as the game play holds up, even after a few years. But what I can't stand is the amount of hand holding. I get that you need a tutorial in most games, but I don't want to have to click through a bunch of text boxes for every little last detail. Some of the boxes could really be removed and no one would miss them. I recommend making the tutorial shorter and not treating your players like that have no brain. It's insulting

Its interesting. A very cool concept and decent execution. It would be infinitely better though if you didn't need to wait 2 entire hours for a single basic chest to unlock. This fact is worsened considering almost everything in the game is on a time limit for some reason. Plus, upgrading is almost pointless since it seems there's no way to get coins but the leaderboard. But you can't go up on it past a point without upgrades, so you're just stuck

I like the game. But it's heavy pay to win. Most games are so I understood this going in but there's an option for prestige when you get to the end. Do not prestige if you spent money on parts or bodies. It will erase them and take them from you. I have to say that's honestly what's stopping me from putting more money as it would just be a waste. I'd like to see this change. However if there is no plans for that then I will just not he spending money on this game anymore.

Honestly, this is a great game. It has a very nice style and fun mechanics. It also has tons of customization and a good forward progression. Just, the ads in this game are hugely abundant and intrusive, as in there are ads after just about every battle/interaction in the game. Most ads are long and are hard to close. Even worse there are some ads that take you to websites that flood you with cookies, and some that promote scams. I get that games need ads to make money, but this is too much.

I started playing this game again after a couple of years of not playing it. It's still fun, and I really like the concepts. However, I am facing people with double the HP and damage using the same star level. I am a little confused why we face people with higher prestiges. it gives the beginner a disadvantage because the others have newer and better weapons. Why not just face people of the same prestige level? It's very hard to progress as a free to play player. But, the game is still fun!

It's good fun, but my only issue is how inconvenient it is. Having "default" placement holes mean that I have to get lucky to be able to get the kind of setup I want. Another problem is the extremely rare "Legendary" qualities that basically make your vehicles overpowered if you get the right setup. This leads to certain lucky/rich players becoming nearly unbeatable at their current stage, showing the dreaded "pay to win" aspect of the game. It was fun for a while, but I'm uninstalling now.

This game is needs extreme changes in gang fight, the matching isn't fair most of the time. Also the chat system is horrific, to add we can't organize attacks, needs a new gang attack strategy management platform to be added. As for ultimate machines upgrading parts is another issue you need a ton of purple cash to do anything. Who would pay a ton of gems for 1k cash that you can barely do anything with! Hopefully this coment will help improving our gaming experience. Thank you

star_4.text: This game was a lot better when I was younger. Now there's just too many ads, and it seems more Pay To Win the Clash Royale! I recommend getting rid of the ads and lowering your prices by 1 or 2 dollars. It'll make a real difference to some people's experience. But, with that out of the way, why did I rate it 4 stars then? EVERYTHING ELSE. The fact that strategy is heavily incorporated is very enjoyable to me. Would give 5 if not ads.

UPDATE: I've prestiged twice now, and have gotten the bubble gun, which they call the lifter, and I've also started a Clan which costs 100 gems. I really think the game is great, but there are PTW options out there... which is how they make their money. It's a great time killer, but I still have a little apprehension about spending money on this game.

So far, an alright little semi-sandbox physics brawler. Semi-sandbox in that it doesn't give you THAT much freedom in the long run, but it tries to with part diversity. Graphics look very polished and everything seems to mesh together well, so that's a plus. As for the long run, I'm yet to trust a free to play mobile game in the long run, I'll have to wait and see some more before I make any judgements on whether it's worth spending lunch time or if it's better spent eating lunch.

This is a really great game and I would rate it 5/5 but there is a little problem. Adds. The adds are SO annoying and you get them after every battle and when you open a chest. You also have to pay three dollars to have no adds. Also this doesn't regard my review but there are some reviews that say the game is basically impossible if you don't spend money and for those wondering it's just a skill issue. I know b/c when I was young I was actually very good at the game without spending money.

Great game, I have been playing for a long time. One issue though that's starting to bother me. If I've earned my way into another tier, let's say gold, I should only be rewarded with that tiers part type and not parts from 3 tiers ago back in military. I've expended time and effort and I think I've at least earned the right to get the parts I've worked up to. Please fix or I will be uninstalling the app. Thanks you for your time.

sure, it has a creative concept but it's just way too hard to progress and in my opinion, too much of a pay-to-win game. I've played the higher levels, and it does get easier, but the solid first 1/4 of the game you're a stuck with bad health and weapons. during the first move from wood to metal, it's almost impossible to upgrade your metal as much as you did the wood.

Thos game is super fun and addicting.I just have one problem. The ads are SO repettive. Like, I'm just trying to get a crate in a Quick Fight and I lose. Then a 30 second unskippable ad pops up and I get nothing from it even though when i try to skip it it says "Completion is reguired to get your reward." Nothing happens when I watch it completely. And I do not have 2 bucks to send on getting rid of all ads. 5 stars when you reduce the ads.

This game is great, honestly! Used to play it when it first came out, and it really has some upgrades that I find are really nice! Just one issue, and yes, you all know it, is the ADS! SO MANY, and some of them are the 30 second unskippable ads after you LOSE A FIGHT (or win). Yes, I think if you have the $3 and some odd cents to block the ads, do it. If not, just grin and bear it. It will take it's eventual toll, but regardless, the game itself is great!

It is a great game where you can play at your own pace! The outcome of your matches are random and what you can come up with to build! You can come across a monster build and still win.   My only complaint is that when a bonus parts box comes up you need to watch an ad. Not an issue but when the ad ends, it hangs up thus you have to exit the game and you end up losing the box! This happens from time to time even on when trying to speed up parts boxes to open. It pisses me off to no end when I lose a bonus box because they are higher star parts.  Things needed in the game is way to organize parts or a bulk sell. Scrolling through all the weapons you have gotten is a pain at times and selling one piece at a time is a little pain.

Very fun and clever little game. I sunk a lot of time into it. Unfortunately, as with most games, it becomes increasingly pay-to-win, especially after your first prestige. I don't think being able to buy more and higher quality parts is necessarily a bad thing, seeing how you can play and watch ads to get boxes, but where it goes sour is certain overpowered weapons being ONLY available from purchases. Makes the game virtually unwinnable after a certain point.

I love the game play and the concept of building attack cars to destroy other attack cars! But there's one thing ruining the experience: Waiting. Too much waiting. The time on supply boxes should be cut in half, the unskippable ads should be at most 15 seconds and not 30, and championships should last for 20 hours and not a whopping 40 hours (two whole days). There's just too much waiting. There's really nothing else to do after you've fused supply parts together and used up all your tickets.

It's a good game and fun to play but the ads are absolutely insane, in-game purchases and optional ads I can totally accept but on top of it there's forced ads and they're pretty awful, extremely frequent and long. The gameplay is good, great even, but the aggressive monetization takes a lot away, like it's packed with players, is there seriously not enough money made off of optional ads and paid purchases? Almost feels like this game would have been better off with a straightforward price tag.

Although the overall gameplay is awesome, I would like the option to sell crates for some coins. It leaves room to more important crates, or just some quick cash when needed. Also, I would like some more to do, as you don't really spend much online in this game. You have to wait for the crates to open to upgrade and experiment more, so that also needs to be fixed. To sum it up, four stars.

I love this game. I had so much fun playing it and I thank the developers for some nostalgia of Cut the Rope. I stopped playing it because it was the same thing over and over again. I was hesitant to stop playing it, which is why I just occasionally play. This is not a bad game, I am only frustrated that certain vehicles with little to no defense could just flip you and drill you to death. The championship was way to hard because I wasn't getting anything good. That's just my experience,notyours

Great game, but it has dropped in quality over the past few years. It's still a great game, but sometimes you'll get crumbled by someone who obviously bought all of their stuff. The ads are also a problem, but that's Unity's fault, not Zeptolab's. Sometimes ads just won't close, and the only way to get them to go a away is to close the app or report the ad.

I LOVE this game. Its really addictive and fun, but when it comes to ads ALL OVER THE PLACE, boom, there goes all the fun. Even though you don't have a choice to skip the ads, One thing I always do it's I Just exit the game and quickly open it again. And POOF! I automatically skip the ad and go back to the game. But I find it annoying. Also, I stopped playing the game for a little bit, and I wanted to play it again, it said that I had bad WiFi. I reconnected, but still didn't work. Please fix.

The game rocks, I love it. It's really fun. I also really like the Ultimate garage. 1 Problem for new players and their co pilots, it doesn't tell you that once you pass rookie you can switch between the bottom and top path . . . I am still very annoyed, I lost a additional 20% health bonus because the game doesn't say I can switch between the top and bottom path. Oh yeah, you can't reverse this, this nearly ruins the game.

I really love this game but there are a few issues. 1. you get ads after every gang fight (each takes about 30 secs), and every time you complete all 14 fights. 2. it's kind of p2w (people who pay have super op stuff, and people who don't get stuck at each stage for about a week) 3. On older devices it crashes (just started doing that lately) However the game is fun and unique enough where none of that ruins the game. You build a car using different parts to make your car as op as possible. 👍

This game is awesome. super addictive and there are several game modes. I spent about an hour on the game and unlocked just about all the cool things that you would think would take a lot longer. definitely good for wasting a bit of time. the only thing I would add would be a way to automatically start the unlock process on the next crate instead of having to manually go into the game to choose the next crate to unlock. but that's my only suggestion.

Fun game But.. A bit too many ads. I understand a free game needs a way to gain their money, but I had this game when it started and the ads weren't as bothersome . Its a fun game nonetheless though. Trying to make the physics work towards your favor, as well as having a million different ways to win, makes it very fun to cuztomize your machine. This, combimed with the fast paced battles usually lasting less than a minute, creates a fun as heck experience.

star_5.text: The game is fun & easy to learn. The learning curve is easy, just copy designs that beat you. I like customization built into the game. It's a designers game. I also like the fact that players cannot directly affect the battle. I dislike forced ads, some are 1 minute long. So players are compelled to buy the anti-ad option. 1 minute ads are too long, 30 second ads would be better. I can tell a lot of creativity went into the games design, that's why I still gave it 5 stars. Try it out.

It's a slow burner but addictive. When I first played it I thought it was just ok, but gradually i got into it and it's a great game to screw around with when i have a few minutes. You can also have long sessions with it but you'll be waiting a while to get new parts /new events before then. Ads are optional for extras which is nice, and my one criticism is that most of the time, if you want to spend money on the game, you don't get that much for it, but that's good for f2p

It's actually a good game. The competition actually requires you to use strategy, and even if you pay, you may win the current league you're in but not the next one. Very balanced game that requires you to come up with your own strategies, and build the car that beats all. Fun, as no control skills are needed, just strategical skills. (Cars fight automatically)

Fantastic game, rewarding gameplay, and i can play in small sittings or sit down for a while with it. Most importantly for me, you can play the whole game without watching adds or paying for microtransactions, or you can buy crates to help you through without feeling like you have to pay or gain an unfair advantage. Its just a great, well balanced game with loads of content!

I have been playing this game ever since it first came out. And man... it's changed so much! In I think a good way. But i really would like for you "zepto lab" to fix the update issue for the kindle fire. It won't update on the kindle fire. I really would appreciate it if would fix it. I was a bit skeptical of the co-pilots when they came out, but there pretty cool actually. But when you first start the ultimate machines, it's way to hard. You should make it so you can invite people to your gang

loved it! surprised there's still people playing after seeing how long ago this was made, its fun, fast, and you are rewarded all the time but you know there's still better people than you, I rate it 5/5, if you like a casual game, this is it, so much to do like gang battles, gang wars, the championship, the Ultimate Garage, and there's bets for bot cars so when you bet a part and that car wins, it gets a bonus! sorry if this didn't include everything, but if it didn't then there's more stuff!

This is a fantastic game, I love acquiring new parts to build new robots with. That what makes this game so much fun, is the creativity in building your robot. I like that there is no energy system so you can keep playing over and over again, the only penality is not winning a supply.box if your slots are full. A cool feature would be to be able to save a current build, in case you wanna try a different building and then easily go back to what you had

This game is super fun, comical, and has a perfect competitive edge. There is something for everyone as long as you like PvP with machines. Clans and clan wars, special fights, and leagues. You can even gamble. The only small problem is sometimes you get unlucky box openings and you'll lose a ton of fights until you can recover. But that's part of the fun as well. Lovely game, I've never enjoyed something on my phone quite as much.

highly addictive, i play this every day, i dont think ive had a single issue since i downloaded it. no glitches or anything. good graphics, no lag, prestige modes keep it interesting for a long time. the only complaint is there isnt a variety of levels to play on. they need to add more arenas. but this has been a progressing project and i know they are working on that, GREAT GAME!

The game looks and feels good. Navigation of the UI is easy. Pay to win if you want. Its all about the vehicles., you need extra slots for weapons and most important power to use them. If the vehicle does not have enough power you cannot equip all slots. If the vehicle oh spend money, the super body pack and super giant parts.

This is a great game, and I think the price to remove ads is more than fair. BUT! The gameplay is very questionable sometimes. I think the closing walls to end the match is pretty annoying, especially when some of the utility items like the shovel decide not to work. Also, I don't understand the calculations behind the laser at all, I'll have more damage and health and still get one-shotted. Definitely no deal breakers for me though, will continue to play!

Easy, fun, and a good balance of ads after paying for forced ad removal. Which you should do, because the game is worth the $3.00. I will agree with the other reviewers that mention that the ads to get bonus stuff often fail. I regularly tap to watch the ad and immediately get the error message that I need to watch the whole ad (which didn't even start). This is actually far more annoying than any of the ads are themselves.

It is a really fun strategy game, if you play it for free the ads can get a bit annoying. You can get rid of the force ads by paying $2 which I think its not bad, since you will also get bonus gifts with the purchase. So far I like the game because I can progress at a decent rate without being force to spend money, it's a big plus for me when playing app games.

This game is super awesome. I kinda wish that you didn't have to pay money to remove the ads, so can you please make that happen. I love the ultimate garage and also one of the weapons is a minigun. You can make a lot of different battle cars and you can fight real life people from all over the world in the championship. Many of the fights are to hard which makes it hard to advance to the next stage so please make some of the fights easier. Overwise awesome game.

I love the app, fun simple gameplay, easy to learn to beginners! But everytime I buy the legendary box (2.99) I always get the same 3 three weapons from it, is it supposed to give 3 of the same weapon, or should it give variety? Would love to change to 5 stars if I could see this issue fixed or some sort of make up for it, I have played this game for about 2 years and only recently started spending on it, don't let me down guys! Edit:seems fixed, would love to see 4 weapon slots on machines tho

It's just a good game done right, the AD function is perfectly fine with me, it doesn't force you, but gives you some slight incentives to watch an AD or two, i like that there arent any banner ads, you can literally play this game without ever watching an ad. On top of that it's actually quite an enjoyable game, there's a lot of stuff to do, but you also can't spend hours on it at a time which is what i like, i can spend like 30mins do everything i can, then I'll get off. Simple as that.

this is a pretty fun game. lots of ways to build your vehicle. very rng and sometimes have to deal with ptw players but you can get tons of stuff easy without having to buy into it, you can actually beat ptw players with the right build. no forced ads is also really nice, actually makes it easier to watch them for the free stuff and reduce time on boxes.

Fantastic game, the ads are not that bad of a problem, however I wish that I could have a bit more ads I can use to speed up crates. The metal crates taking six hours is a bit too Long, especially with the fact you can only hold four crates at a time, having four metal crates leaves you bored and almost forces you out of the game too early. Other than that, the gameplay is solid!

great game, i love how u can make a huge fighting machine. i just wish the games random weapon giving to newbies was more fair, it gives u crappy weapons and barely any money. its setting u up too fail. one more thing, maybe update the boxes you get from quick matches or any boxes. update the boxes so you can pick between 2 items before moving to the next item. (ex: Metal blade or chainsaw? Player picks what they want, Next metal titan or boulder? once again, player picks what they want. ect....)

A nice game that doesn't take too much of your time. The forced adds can be removed as cheap as 3$, or whenever you purchase anything, it also removes them. I also remember that the ads only role when you are done with the tutorial. I believe that should be a standard for all games so they can at least try it out without interruption. Also, you can find some creative minds in the game
